Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Elysian Incarnation]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Legend says Queen Cynara gave her life fighting an Elysian Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — The Elysian Incarnation is an invading force in Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — The Elysian Incarnation executed Grandmaster Helgard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — The Elysian Incarnation is an entity that Simon wants to prevent from taking too much control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The Elysian Incarnation is a person Simon faces.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — The Elysian Incarnation led an attack against the young nation of Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — The Elysian Incarnation manipulated the other Incarnations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Simon is unsure of what the Elysian Incarnation might be capable of.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
